title: Aayiram Thamarai Mottukale Lyrics Alaigal Oivathillai
stanzas:
<div>
Aayiram Thamarai Mottukale Lyrics Alaigal Oivathillai

Aayiram thamarai mottukale
vandhu aanandha
kummigal  kottungalen (2)

ingu rendu jothi malligai
thottukollum kaaman pandgai
koyilil kadhal tholugai.

Aayiram thamarai mottukale
vandhu aanandha
kummigal  kottungalen

koththu malarae
amudham kottum malarae
ingu thaenai ottru
idhu theeyin ootru. (2)

ullirukkum verai vandhu
neer vaarkkum.
pullarikkum maeni
engum poo pookkum.
adikkadi thaagam vandhu
aalai kudikkum.

Aayiram thamarai mottukale
vandhu aanandha
kummigal  kottungalen(2)

veettukiliye koondai vittu
thaandi vandhiye
oru kadhal baaram
iru tholil yaerum.

pulveliyin meedhu
rendu poo maazhai.
ondrai ondru soodum
idhu pon meadai.
kalvadiyum pookkal
thangal kaambai marakkum.

Aayiram thamarai mottukale
vandhu aanandha
kummigal  kottungalen

ingu rendu jothi malligai
thottukollum kaaman pandgai
koyilil kadhal tholugai.

Aayiram thamarai mottukale
vandhu aanandha
kummigal  kottungalen

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the lead actors in the movie Alaigal Oivathillai?

The lead actors are Karthik and Radha.

Who composed the music for the song Aayiram Thamarai Mottukale?

The music was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

What is the theme of the song?

The song beautifully expresses romantic emotions and the joy of love.

When was the movie Alaigal Oivathillai released?

The movie was released in the year 1981.

What makes this song a classic?

The combination of Ilaiyaraaja's composition, heartfelt lyrics, and the soulful rendition by the singers makes it timeless.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Aayiram Thamarai Mottukale from the 1981 Tamil movie Alaigal Oivathillai, starring Karthik and Radha, is a romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Composed by Ilaiyaraaja, the song's soothing tune and poetic lyrics evoke deep emotions and nostalgia. It portrays the blossoming of love between the lead characters, set against a serene backdrop. This timeless classic remains a favorite among fans of Tamil cinema and music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aayiram Thamarai Mottukale, a timeless melody from the movie Alaigal Oivathillai, captures the essence of romantic expression. With its enchanting tune composed by Ilaiyaraaja and heartfelt lyrics, this song remains a cherished classic in Tamil cinema. Experience the magic of love and nostalgia through this iconic piece.
stanzaMeanings: A thousand lotus buds, waves never cease.
A thousand lotus buds come and burst into joyful dances.
Here, two lights touch the jasmine garden, a festival of love in the temple of affection.
A thousand lotus buds come and burst into joyful dances.
Clustered flowers, nectar-dripping flowers, here flows honey, this is a stream of fire.
Roots within are watered, the body shivers, flowers bloom everywhere, thirst arises repeatedly, drinking from the stream.
A thousand lotus buds come and burst into joyful dances.
The house parrot escapes its cage, a burden of love mounts on its shoulders.
On the grassy field, two flowers rain, one adorns the other, this is a golden stage, flowers forget their stems.
A thousand lotus buds come and burst into joyful dances.
Here, two lights touch the jasmine garden, a festival of love in the temple of affection.
A thousand lotus buds come and burst into joyful dances.
